en: Oh, wow. Dude, these look great. Yeah, we should post that.
ja: うん、投稿しようよ。
zhTW: 對，我們應該發這個。
vi: U, minh nen dang len.

en: What's up, my dude? What's up, dude? Oh, my God. Oh, no.
ja: よう、元気？やあ。
zhTW: 嘿，兄弟？怎樣？
vi: Chao, ong ban? Khoe khong?

en: What happened? Oh, sorry I'm late.
ja: あ、遅れてごめん。
zhTW: 噢，抱歉我遲到了。
vi: O, xin loi toi den tre.

en: Got blown by the subway. Damn, you see a train. How are y'all doing?
ja: 地下鉄の風にやられた。
zhTW: 被地鐵的風吹到了。
vi: Bi gio tau dien ngam thoi.

en: No, dude, your face. Did you get Botox?
ko: 아니, 야, 니 얼굴. 보톡스 맞았어?
ja: いや、おい、顔だよ。ボトックスやった？
zhTW: 不是，老兄，你的臉。你打了肉毒桿菌？
vi: Khong, e, mat ban. Ban tiem Botox a?

en: Oh, you guys can tell? Yes. Yeah, I just got a little touch-up. What? So, this was intentional,
ja: うん、ちょっと手直ししただけ。
zhTW: 對，我只是稍微修一下。
vi: U, toi chi sua nhe thoi.

en: not an accident? Yeah, I figured we're gonna be on camera a little more. Might as well look my best.
ja: 事故じゃなくて？うん、カメラに映ることが増えると思って。
zhTW: 不是意外？對，我想我們會更常上鏡。
vi: khong phai tai nan? U, toi nghi chung ta se len hinh nhieu hon.

en: Ben, you know I love you. Love you, too. You look like you drowned.
ko: Ben, 내가 널 사랑하는 거 알지.
ja: 俺も愛してる。溺れたみたいだよ。
zhTW: 我也愛你。你看起來像溺水了。
vi: Toi cung yeu ban. Trong ban nhu bi chet duoi.

en: I feel like I'm at your wake. You look embalmed.
ko: 장례식에 온 것 같아. 방부 처리한 것 같아.
ja: お通夜に来た気分だ。防腐処理されたみたい。
zhTW: 我覺得我在你的告別式。你看起來像被防腐處理了。
vi: Toi cam giac nhu dang o dam tang ban. Trong ban nhu duoc uop xac.

en: I asked for the chalamet. Is that coming through? No. No. I like it, man.
ja: それっぽい？いや。いや。いいと思うよ。
zhTW: 看得出來嗎？不。不。我喜歡，老兄。
vi: Co thay khong? Khong. Khong. Toi thich do, anh ban.

en: I paid top dollar for this thing. How much? $150.
ja: これ高い金払ったんだぞ。
zhTW: 我花了大錢做這個。
vi: Toi tra gia cao lam day.

en: That's not enough. Not enough? For full-face Botox? That sucks.
ja: 足りない？顔全体のボトックスで？
zhTW: 不夠？全臉肉毒桿菌？
vi: Khong du? Botox ca mat?

en: I wish there was an undo button for this thing. Your face isn't even moving when you laugh, dude.
ko: 야, 웃을 때 얼굴이 안 움직여.
ja: 最悪だ。元に戻すボタンがあればいいのに。
zhTW: 太慘了。真希望有個復原按鈕。
vi: Te qua. Uoc gi co nut hoan tac cho vu nay.

en: This is so bad. I'm sorry. What did you do? Oh, my God.
ko: 이건 진짜 심각하다. 미안한데, 너는 뭐 했어?
ja: これはひどい。ごめん、君は何したの？
zhTW: 這太糟了。抱歉，你做了什麼？
vi: Te qua. Xin loi, ban lam gi vay?

en: What is with your fingers? Oh, yeah, I got some work done myself.
ko: 아, 응, 나도 좀 시술 받았어.
ja: ああ、うん、僕もちょっと手を入れたんだ。
zhTW: 噢，對，我自己也做了一些。
vi: A, u, toi cung sua chut.

en: You got longer fingers? Oh, my God. We are not making this about my fingers.
ja: もう。指の話にしないでよ。
zhTW: 天啊。我們不要把話題轉到我的手指。
vi: Troi oi. Dung ban ve ngon tay toi.

en: Wait, you extended them? You know how many YouTube comments there were about how short they were before?
ko: 잠깐, 연장한 거야? 예전에 손가락 짧다고 유튜브 댓글이 얼마나 달렸는지 알아?
ja: ちょっと、伸ばしたの？以前どれだけYouTubeで短いってコメントされたか知ってる？
zhTW: 等等，你延長了？你知道之前YouTube上有多少留言說你手指短嗎？
vi: Khoan, ban noi dai chung? Ban biet truoc day co bao nhieu binh luan YouTube noi ngon tay ban ngan khong?

en: Well, now you look like the Babadook. Wow, Martin. How about you go, shh?
ko: 이제 바바둑 같아 보여. 와, Martin. 좀 조용히 하지?
ja: 今やバババドゥクみたいだよ。わあ、マーティン。黙ったら？
zhTW: 現在你看起來像乘乘鬥。哇，馬丁。你閉嘴好嗎？
vi: Gio trong ban giong Babadook. Cha, Martin. Im di duoc khong?

en: Don't touch my mouth. No. Wow. You look like Pan's Labyrinth.
ja: いや。うわ。パンズ・ラビリンスみたい。
zhTW: 不。哇。你看起來像乘乘的迷宮。
vi: Khong. Cha. Trong ban giong Me cung cua Pan.

en: Do I? Do this. That's Pan. That's Pan.
ko: 그래? 이거 해봐. 그게 판이야. 그게 판이야.
ja: そう？これやって。それパンだ。それパンだ。
zhTW: 真的嗎？你做這個。那就是乘。那就是乘。
vi: That a? Lam cai nay. Do la Pan. Do la Pan.

en: Oh, yeah. Well, yeah, sure, fine. But these fingers rock. I feel more confident.
ko: 아, 맞네. 그래, 좋아, 인정, 근데 이 손가락 끝내줘.
ja: ああ、そうだね。まあ、うん、いいけど、この指最高だから。
zhTW: 噢，對。好吧，是啊，好，但這些手指超讚。
vi: A, u. Thoi, u, duoc, nhung may ngon tay nay tuyet lam.

en: I play guitar easier. I can do cool stuff like West Side.
ko: 웨스트사이드 같은 멋진 것도 할 수 있어.
ja: ウエストサイドみたいなかっこいいこともできる。
zhTW: 我可以做像西城故事那樣酷的動作。
vi: Toi co the lam nhung thu ngau nhu West Side.

en: I got Botox. I look good. You know what? Should I get some work done on my face?
ja: ねえ、僕も顔に何かした方がいい？
zhTW: 你知道嗎？我要不要也修一下臉？
vi: Ban biet khong? Toi co nen sua mat khong?

en: No. Oh, you don't need it. I know. I'm talking about my second face.
ja: わかってる。二つ目の顔の話。うわ！
zhTW: 我知道。我說的是我的第二張臉。噁！
vi: Toi biet. Toi noi ve khuon mat thu hai. E!

en: Ew! What the hell? What? What is that? I know, I know. He needs a nose job.
ja: わかってる、わかってる。鼻の整形が必要だね。
zhTW: 我知道，我知道。他需要隆鼻。
vi: Toi biet, toi biet. No can sua mui.

en: No, what the hell is it? Does it talk?
ja: いや、一体何なんだ？喋るの？
zhTW: 不是，那到底是什麼？它會說話嗎？
vi: Khong, cai quai gi the? No noi duoc a?

en: Oh, he used to, but then I think he died.
ko: 아, 예전에는 했는데, 죽은 것 같아.
ja: ああ、前は喋ってたけど、死んだみたい。
zhTW: 噢，以前會，但我覺得他死了。
vi: A, truoc day thi co, nhung toi nghi no chet roi.

en: Oh! Okay, this is so toxic. Can we all agree that we're beautiful on the inside?
ja: みんな内面は美しいってことで同意できる？
zhTW: 我們可以同意我們內在都很美嗎？
vi: Moi nguoi co dong y rang chung ta dep ben trong khong?

en: I guess so. Yeah. I agree. Who said that?
ja: 同意。誰が言ったの？
zhTW: 我同意。誰說的？
vi: Toi dong y. Ai noi vay?

en: It was me. You guys are beautiful. Oh!
ja: みんな美しいよ。おお！
zhTW: 你們很美。噢！
vi: Cac ban dep lam. O!
